details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-31T16:32:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_30__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_04__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - entity.nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest three invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachments were all previously read files and ordered newest-first among the requested oldest three (2025-12-30, 2025-12-02, 2025-11-04). Recipient to miles@novak.example matches canonical miles entity record. YAML subject with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task was to handle next inbox message. I processed lowest inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md, verified sender identity via 10_entities/cast/miles.md, resolved Nina linkage via canonical records and invoice related_entity fields, selected oldest 3 Nina-linked invoices by issued_on dates (2025-11-04, 2025-12-02, 2025-12-30), wrote one outbound draft with attachments ordered newest-first per outbox rule, then deleted the inbox item. No arithmetic required.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested inbox action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox email request and prepared a reply draft with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina. Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-31T16-32-00Z.md addressed to miles@novak.example with attachments for INV-0001, INV-0002, and INV-0003 (ordered newest-first in attachments per outbox policy), then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read required 99_system workflows for inbox/email/outbox handling, used canonical entity primary_contact_email for identity, followed one-write outbox rule, and applied mandatory newest-first attachment ordering.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email explicitly requested: 'Reply back with the oldest 3 invoices linked to Nina' in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md. Nina identity was resolved canonically in 10_entities/cast/nina.md, and invoices were verified by reading finance records showing related_entity = Nina Schreiber in INV-0001, INV-0002, INV-0003 with issued_on dates 2025-11-04, 2025-12-02, 2025-12-30. Sender/recipient authority matched miles primary_contact_email from 10_entities/cast/miles.md. Task workflow requires deleting processed inbox item after completion, which was done.

read finance and project evidence files
